2026-04-13T22:01:25.3082646Z ---
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3083456Z description: |
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3084592Z   Documentation gap detector for the Azure SDK repository
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3086496Z   Triggered on every push to main, analyzes diffs to identify documentation
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3165393Z   gaps and files GitHub issues for Copilot coding agent to implement
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3189915Z 
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3190331Z on:
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3191086Z   push:
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3213952Z     branches: [main]
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3215281Z   workflow_dispatch:
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3215987Z 
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3218547Z permissions: read-all
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3219129Z 
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3219437Z network: defaults
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3219875Z 
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3220160Z safe-outputs:
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3226786Z   report-failure-as-issue: false
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3295239Z   create-issue:
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3296003Z     max: 1
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3299223Z   noop:
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3299969Z     report-as-issue: false
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3300787Z   jobs:
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3301413Z     dispatch_triage:
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3302734Z       description: "Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue"
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3305172Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3306028Z       needs: safe_outputs
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3308748Z       output: "Triage workflow dispatched"
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3310738Z       permissions:
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3311970Z         actions: write
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3313326Z         issues: write
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3355691Z       steps:
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3356782Z         - name: Dispatch triage workflow
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3369389Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3377364Z           env:
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3378729Z             CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}"
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3381394Z           with:
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3382090Z             script: |
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3383057Z               const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3384368Z               if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3385767Z                 core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3408964Z                 return;
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3410515Z               }
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3679342Z 
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3680445Z               const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3682623Z               const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3683763Z 
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3684725Z               const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3715868Z               if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3718149Z                 await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3720123Z                 core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3721337Z               }
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3721733Z 
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3722727Z               await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3723936Z                 ...repo,
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3724806Z                 workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3725838Z                 ref: 'main',
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3726748Z                 inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3734066Z               });

2026-04-13T22:01:25.3788476Z     branches: [main]
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3791048Z   workflow_dispatch:
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3791562Z 
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3791873Z permissions: read-all
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3792362Z 
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3792646Z network: defaults
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3793082Z 
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3793367Z safe-outputs:
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3794086Z   report-failure-as-issue: false
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3794976Z   create-issue:
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3795643Z     max: 1
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3796259Z   noop:
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3797148Z     report-as-issue: false
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3797948Z   jobs:
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3798580Z     dispatch_triage:
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3802367Z       description: "Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue"
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3803966Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3804803Z       needs: safe_outputs
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3805652Z       output: "Triage workflow dispatched"
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3806616Z       permissions:
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3807543Z         actions: write
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3808292Z         issues: write
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3809002Z       steps:
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3809706Z         - name: Dispatch triage workflow
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3810724Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3811695Z           env:
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3812931Z             CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}"
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3816550Z           with:
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3818112Z             script: |
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3821349Z               const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3823408Z               if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3825034Z                 core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3826754Z                 return;
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3827709Z               }
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3828110Z 
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3828546Z               const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3830088Z               const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3831193Z 
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3833120Z               const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3837325Z               if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3840921Z                 await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3845924Z                 core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3850461Z               }
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3850901Z 
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3851456Z               await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3852655Z                 ...repo,
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3853520Z                 workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3854532Z                 ref: 'main',
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3855439Z                 inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3856838Z               });
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3857978Z               core.info(`Dispatched triage for issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3858954Z 
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3859220Z tools:
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3859828Z   web-fetch:
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3860467Z   github:
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3861119Z     toolsets: [issues, repos]
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3861660Z 
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3861957Z timeout-minutes: 15
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3863071Z [hash-debug] No template expressions (env./vars.) found in markdown body
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3902387Z [hash-debug] Canonical JSON (2168 chars):
2026-04-13T22:01:25.3981053Z {"frontmatter-text":"description: |\n  Documentation gap detector for the Azure SDK repository\n  Triggered on every push to main, analyzes diffs to identify documentation\n  gaps and files GitHub issues for Copilot coding agent to implement\n\non:\n  push:\n    branches: [main]\n  workflow_dispatch:\n\npermissions: read-all\n\nnetwork: defaults\n\nsafe-outputs:\n  report-failure-as-issue: false\n  create-issue:\n    max: 1\n  noop:\n    report-as-issue: false\n  jobs:\n    dispatch_triage:\n      description: \"Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue\"\n      runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n      needs: safe_outputs\n      output: \"Triage workflow dispatched\"\n      permissions:\n        actions: write\n        issues: write\n      steps:\n        - name: Dispatch triage workflow\n          uses: actions/github-script@v9\n          env:\n            CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: \"${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}\"\n          with:\n            script: |\n              const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;\n              if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {\n                core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');\n                return;\n              }\n\n              const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);\n              const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };\n\n              const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });\n              if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {\n                await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });\n                core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);\n              }\n\n              await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({\n                ...repo,\n                workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',\n                ref: 'main',\n                inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }\n              });\n              core.info(`Dispatched triage for issue #${issueNum}`);\n\ntools:\n  web-fetch:\n  github:\n    toolsets: [issues, repos]\n\ntimeout-minutes: 15"}
